evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Structured and analytical manner with emphasis on data quality
evidence.domain_risk: Create Power BI dashboards and reports for monitoring and decision-making
evidence.data_team_maturity: Develop and implement a unified sustainability data platform integrating multiple sources
evidence.jd_authorship: Design and operate scalable data pipelines within Microsoft Fabric; Gather requirements and translate them into effective reporting and analytics solutions
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Develop and implement a unified sustainability data platform integrating multiple sources
evidence.autonomy_level: Gather requirements and translate them into effective reporting and analytics solutions
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Develop and implement a unified sustainability data platform integrating multiple sources; Improve data management processes

velocity_vs_rigour_quote: Structured and analytical manner with emphasis on data quality
velocity_vs_rigour_reasoning: Only rigour signals present (data quality emphasis, data modeling); no velocity language.
domain_risk_quote: Create Power BI dashboards and reports for monitoring and decision-making
domain_risk_reasoning: The role focuses on internal analytics and reporting for business decision-making without explicit financial reporting or regulatory compliance as core responsibilities, despite EUDR compliance appearing only as a bonus skill.
data_team_maturity_quote: Develop and implement a unified sustainability data platform integrating multiple sources
data_team_maturity_reasoning: The emphasis on developing and implementing a unified platform while operating within established tools (Microsoft Fabric, Power BI) signals an existing data function with infrastructure that is growing and scaling.
jd_authorship_quote: Design and operate scalable data pipelines within Microsoft Fabric; Gather requirements and translate them into effective reporting and analytics solutions
jd_authorship_reasoning: The JD combines technical specificity about platforms (Microsoft Fabric) with generic recruiter-style action verbs (gather requirements, translate solutions), indicating mixed authorship.
stakeholder_orientation_quote: Develop and implement a unified sustainability data platform integrating multiple sources
stakeholder_orientation_reasoning: The role focuses on building data infrastructure and dashboards for internal sustainability monitoring and decision-making rather than serving commercial, product, finance, or external audiences.
autonomy_level_quote: Gather requirements and translate them into effective reporting and analytics solutions
autonomy_level_reasoning: The primary verbs (gather, create, contribute, translate) indicate responsive execution of others' requirements rather than strategic direction-setting.
greenfield_vs_fix_quote: Develop and implement a unified sustainability data platform integrating multiple sources; Improve data management processes
ai_role_quote: Design and operate scalable data pipelines within Microsoft Fabric
ai_role_reasoning: Standard analytics engineering work (pipelines, dashboards, data platforms) with no mention of AI tools, GenAI infrastructure, or AI-assisted development.
testing_framing_reasoning: Data quality is stated as a value without ownership language ('own', 'ensure', 'define', 'implement') or testing tools mentioned.
loss_aversion_framing_quote: Structured and analytical manner with emphasis on data quality
loss_aversion_framing_reasoning: Framing centers on analytical capability and quality standards without references to incidents, SLOs, compliance, regulatory concerns, or bad-data-to-stakeholder risks.
